reasoning: The Comments History reveals a DEVICE SECURITY ALERT indicating 94% device fingerprint mismatch (historical iPhone/Safari in California vs. recent Android/Chrome in Eastern Europe), suggesting unauthorized account access. While previous refund requests were legitimate subscription confusion cases, this new claim ('Received different product') contradicts the order's documented product (Sample Product/SKU PRODUCT-001) and breaks the established pattern of subscription-related requests. The security risk combined with inconsistent refund justification requires escalation per protocol.
